name: Fall Pear Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME - OCT/NOV 95
In a large bowl, combine pears, sugar, tapioca and nutmeg. Line a pie plate with bottom crust; add pear mixture. Roll the remaining pastry to fit top of pie; cut large slits in top. Place over filling; seal and flute edges. Brush with egg. Bake at 375 degrees for 55-60 minutes or until pears are tender. Remove from oven. Pour cream through slits if desired.
